title: CPU Fetching a Word from Memory
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequence of operations performed by a CPU to retrieve a single word of data from the main memory module.
relationships: The Control Unit directs the flow of data. The PC sends an address to the MAR via the internal bus. The MAR sends the address to Main Memory. Main Memory returns the data word to the MDR. The MDR holds the data for the CPU to use.
